
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Oma's Gazpacho.
    Summary: Nathan,

Oma Dianne has some of the best recipes! When she decided to move from her home into assisted living she allowed me to have her recipe cards. I have not made all of them but I can almost guarantee they are the best. Just like you and your soon to be little brother. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 6 to 8  ripe tomatoes, 1 to 2 cups cold water with ice cubes, ⅓ to ½  onion, ½  green pepper, ⅓ to ¾  cucumber, 1 to 2 cloves garlic, ⅓ to ½ cup olive oil, ⅓ to ½ c sherry vinegar, 1 ½ Tbs salt, 1 tsp sugar
    Tags: undefined
    The image should be high quality and suitable for a recipe website.
    Do not include any letters or text in the image.
    Make sure the picture includes a garden gnome in it.
